archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) tailored to Minimal Sci-Fi

design_philosophy.core_concept: Futuristic AI Command Center - A living, breathing graph of AI agents collaborating in real-time.
design_philosophy.emotion: Intelligent, powerful, orchestrated, high-tech but structurally minimal.
design_philosophy.anti_patterns_avoided: No chaotic neon overload. Colors are used selectively for function (status, data flow) rather than pure decoration. No pure black; using deep tinted slates.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: The 'Control Room' Grid - High density, precise alignment, exposed structural grid lines.

layout_structure.header: Minimal floating glass header (z-50) with logo and system status.
layout_structure.main_canvas: A massive interactive-feeling node canvas taking up 60% of viewport. CEO at top center. Connecting animated SVG paths to Marketing agents below.
layout_structure.side_panel: Live Terminal / Activity Feed logging real-time steps of the AI.
layout_structure.bottom_dock: Command input bar with quick-action chips floating above it.

motion_and_interactions.data_flow: Use framer-motion to draw SVG lines between nodes (CEO -> Agents). Use stroke-dasharray animation to simulate 'data packets' traveling along the paths.
motion_and_interactions.status_indicators: Pulsing colored dots (Green=Working, Cyan=Thinking, Pink=Outputting, Gray=Idle).
motion_and_interactions.typing_effect: Logs in the terminal should appear with a typewriter effect.
motion_and_interactions.microinteractions: Buttons and inputs glow subtly on hover.

components_strategy.node_graph: Custom HTML/SVG overlay for the lines. Shadcn Cards for the agent nodes positioned absolutely or via grid.
components_strategy.input_bar: Customized Shadcn Input, styled like a CLI prompt ('>') with glowing submit button.
components_strategy.badges: For agent roles (e.g., 'SEO', 'Ads') use Shadcn Badge with glassmorphism.
components_strategy.locked_teams: Placeholders for 'Engineering', 'Sales' using grayed-out opacity-50 dashed borders with lock icons.

assets_and_icons.icon_library: lucide-react for system icons (locks, sends, terminals).

background.usage: Use as a very low opacity (10-15%) fixed background overlay with mix-blend-screen to give a subtle futuristic texture behind the UI.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Unbounded, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono fonts from Google Fonts via next/font or standard import in CSS.
Create a complex single-page dashboard. The layout should have a central area for the visual Node Graph and a side/bottom area for Terminal Logs and Command Input.
Use Framer Motion to create connecting SVG lines between the CEO node and the Marketing Team nodes. Animate dashes along these lines to simulate data transfer when a task is active.

Build a state machine (can be dummy React state) where entering a command sets the CEO to 'Thinking', routes a task to a specific Marketing agent (who turns 'Working'), logs the process in the terminal, and then outputs a result.
Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. You can use generic bot icons (Bot, Cpu, Brain) for the Marketing sub-agents.
Include greyed-out 'Add Team' placeholder slots for 'Sales', 'Engineering' to show future scalability.
Apply 'optical clarity' glassmorphism to floating UI elements (input bar, terminal card).
